profile.name: Sarthak Dixit
profile.tagline: APIs that ship. Dashboards that answer
profile.bio: Developer and data analyst building RESTful APIs and analytics pipelines, with the cloud infrastructure chops to ship them end-to-end — from first commit to production.

experience.description: Part of the team migrating a legacy COBOL system to .NET. Used GenAI tooling to accelerate code translation, modernize patterns, and reduce manual rewrite effort.

Built React + TypeScript front-ends and .NET Core / MuleSoft APIs, plus Python automation workflows that cut manual ops toil by 50%. Part of the team which migrated from Splunk to Dynatrace with custom dashboards and alerting.

projects.title: system-design-teacher
projects.description: A web platform for practicing system-design interviews. Drag components onto a canvas, submit your architecture, and get structured AI feedback in seconds.

labels.consoleSubtext: nice to meet someone who checks the console. drop me a line:
